name: dev-commands
description: Curated developer slash-commands for the chat surfaces — /commit, /review, /test, /explain, /pr, /docs. Each is a reusable prompt macro (opencode-style custom command): type it (optionally with an argument) and the agent runs the workflow. Opt-in; pick which to enable below.

configSchema.label: Enabled commands
configSchema.hint: Which developer commands to expose. Leave empty to enable them all.

options.label: /commit — stage + write a Conventional Commits message
/test — run the test suite and fix failures
/pr — write a pull-request description for this branch
